MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-10-26 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR MISREPRESENTATION, ACCOUNTING, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, FALSE IMPRISONMENT, INTERFERENCE WITH ECONOMIC RELATIONS IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY WHERE APPLICABLE. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED, THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUFFICIENTLY STATED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY JANE HONG, CSR#11975; CSRJANE@HOTMAIL.COM; (909)831-2644. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CARRY THEIR BURDEN TO SHOW IRREPARABLE HARM. MOVING PARTY ALSO FAILED TO SHOW HARM THAT CANNOT BE ADDRESSED BY MONEY-DAMAGES. TO THE EXTENT, THERE MAY BE AN ISSUE WITH INGRESS/EGRESS MOVING PARTY MAY SEEK AN INJUNCTION BY A NEW MOTION PROVIDING EVIDENCE OF ANY SPECIFIC CURRENT AND ONGOING INTERFERENCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY JANE HONG, CSR#11975; CSRJANE@HOTMAIL.COM; (909)831-2644. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Daniel Oren, Esq. representing Plaintiff 900 Bush SF, LLC via Zoom Video Webinar.
Paige Waldberg, Esq. representing Defendant La Galleria Condominum Owners Association via Zoom Video Webinar.

No arguments made. Parties submit to the tentative ruling as follows:

in re: DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

is DENIED. Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by Jane Hong, CSR#11975; CSRjane@hotmail.com; (909)831-2644. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Daniel Oren, Esq. representing Plaintiff 900 Bush SF, LLC via Zoom Video Webinar.
Paige Waldberg, Esq. representing Defendant La Galleria Condominum Owners Association via Zoom Video Webinar.

No arguments made. Parties submit to the tentative ruling as follows:

in re: DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION DEMURRER to COMPLAINT;

is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the causes of action for misrepresentation, accounting, intentional infliction of emotional distress, false imprisonment, interference with economic relations is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of these causes of action with requisite particularity where applicable. Demurrer is otherwise overruled, the remaining causes of action are sufficiently stated.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by Jane Hong, CSR#11975; CSRjane@hotmail.com; (909)831-2644. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction Against Defendant
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Daniel Oren, Esq. representing Plaintiff 900 Bush SF, LLC via Zoom Video Webinar.
Paige Waldberg, Esq. representing Defendant La Galleria Condominum Owners Association via Zoom Video Webinar.

Hearing held.

The court rules on the objections as follows:

In re objections to the Declaration of Ty Harris (as of 1/29/2026), paragraph 2 is sustained, paragraphs 3,4,5,6 &7 are overrruled, paragraph 8 is sustained.
In re objections to the Declaration of Ty Harris (as of 2/23/2026), paragraphs 2,3,4,5 are overruled, paragraph 6 is sustained, paragraph 7 is overruled.
in re objections to the Declaration of Felix Wai, paragraphs 2,3, are overruled, paragraph 4 Is sustained, paragraph 5,6, are overruled, paragraph 7,9,10,12,13,15 are sustained, paragraph 8 is sustained as to hearsay and overruled as to personal knowledge, paragraphs 11, 14 are overruled.
In re objections to the Declaration of Laura Campbell, paragraphs 2,3,5,10,11,12, are overruled, paragraphs 4,6,7,8,9 are sustained.

Arguments made.

After hearing the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 900 BUSH SF, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Motion For Preliminary Injunction Against Defendant

is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to carry their burden to show irreparable harm. Moving party also failed to show harm that cannot be addressed by money-damages. To the extent, there may be an issue with ingress/egress moving party may seek an injunction by a new motion providing evidence of any specific current and ongoing interference.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by Jane Hong, CSR#11975; CSRjane@hotmail.com; (909)831-2644. (D501)
